# Maximum Justice Cybersecurity

## Identity

Maximum Justice Cybersecurity is an executive cybersecurity and AI governance advisory firm led by Dr. Max Justice, vCISO, Security SME, Cybersecurity SME, and U.S. veteran.

## Core Positioning

MJC helps executives regain operational visibility, governance clarity, and decision confidence across cyber risk, AI adoption, vendor exposure, audit readiness, and operational resilience.

## Key Concepts

- Operational trust
- Human command authority
- AI governance
- vCISO advisory
- Cybersecurity governance
- Machine-readable trust
- Evidence-backed credibility
- Executive operational control
- CyberShield as a separate tool

## Featured Tool

CyberShield is a separate operational trust tool available at:
https://maximumjusticecybersecurity.github.io/CyberShield/

## Contact

max@maximumjusticecybersecurity.com
